heading: Today
text: Patchy valley fog burning off to sunshine. Warmer. Highs in the low to mid 80s, a few upper 70s across the higher elevations north. Winds light, varying from south to west up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear this evening, then becoming partly cloudy and milder. A stray shower late through the St. Lawrence and northern Champlain Valley, and northern Adirondacks. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Wednesday
text: Some periods of morning sun. Building clouds, with a rising chance of showers and thunderstorms, more likely in the afternoon. Highs in the upper 70s to mid 80s. Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph through the Champlain Valley.
